title: Microwave Control of Superconducting Qubits
description: Learn how microwave signals interact with superconducting qubits to perform quantum gates. Understand the rotating frame, Rabi oscillations, and the fundamentals of coherent qubit control through electromagnetic pulses.
learningObjectives: Explain how microwave fields couple to superconducting qubits through the charge operator
Derive the qubit Hamiltonian in the rotating frame and understand its significance
Analyze Rabi oscillations and calculate pulse parameters for specific rotations
Understand the role of the rotating wave approximation in pulse design
Design basic microwave pulses for X, Y, and Z rotations
